frontmatter.name: Lucas Mouw
frontmatter.text: I loved working with Shahwar on this project. He was exceptionally good, has great communication and technical skills. He created awesome designs, and delivered me exactly what I was looking for. I actually have hired him again for another project. He surely knows his way around Ruby on rails, and ReactJS. Highly recommended guy! He was able to finalize the project before the deadline, which was great because I needed it to be done fast!

frontmatter.name: Alex K.
frontmatter.text: Amazing talent and skills. Work was completed as requested earlier than expected. Communication was clear. Highly recommended developer. He is a beast when it comes to Ruby on Rails, and React

frontmatter.name: Charf M.
frontmatter.text: Shahwar is a great freelance to work with. He is very helpful and approachable and is always available to answer any questions. I would highly recommend working with him for any king of Ruby on Rails development!
